creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
sysutils/ansible1: Remove deprecated port, use sysutils/ansible instead.

sysutils/ansible1 was marked as deprecated when ansible version 2 was released. The plan was to remove the port once it had been more than 6 months since the last release of a version from the 1.x branch. The last ansible1 release was 1.9.6 on 16th April 2016, and I therefore propose to remove this port.
